articles.title: Karen Read, Turtleboy look to get witnesses’ defamation suit tossed
articles.description:
“I would submit that Aidan Kearney successfully enlisted the greatest degree of public participation in a judicial proceeding in the history of this commonwealth.” 

The post Karen Read, Turtleboy look to get witnesses’ defamation suit tossed appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Karen Read and Turtleboy seek dismissal of defamation suit involving Aidan Kearney.
Kearney claims unprecedented public participation in judicial proceedings in Massachusetts.
Outcome may influence future defamation cases and public engagement in Boston.

articles.title: The invisible force helping fuel this summer’s intense heat, and all our weather
articles.description:
This summer’s extreme heat is less a series of isolated events than one evolving atmospheric story.

The post The invisible force helping fuel this summer’s intense heat, and all our weather appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston experiences extreme summer heat due to evolving atmospheric conditions.
Temperatures have soared above 90°F multiple times this July, affecting local residents.
Increased heat may strain Boston's energy resources and impact public health.

summary: Patriots' offensive line showed significant improvement in 2025, enhancing team performance.

Improved offensive line could boost local fan engagement and game attendance in Boston.

articles.title: Many questions remain after an ICE officer’s fatal shooting of a Maine driver
articles.description:
The shooting Monday during an immigration enforcement operation in the city of Biddeford marked the second time in a week that ICE used deadly force.

The post Many questions remain after an ICE officer’s fatal shooting of a Maine driver appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICE officer fatally shot a Maine driver during an enforcement operation on July 10.
